_note: Animal companions (George: companion & hunting animals for all). TAME an adjacent wild animal (Hunting-gated + a food lure) and it joins your party to FIGHT beside you (a guardian) or aid the HUNT (a hunter — you strike beasts harder while it runs at your side). A wild horse (mustang) is tamed as a MOUNT instead. `dc` is the taming difficulty (a food lure eases it by 4; your Hunting skill + 10 must meet it). Read by engine/animal_companions.

wolf.desc: a grey wolf, fierce and loyal once won

boar.desc: a tusked boar that charges anything it doesn't like

hog.desc: a bristly hog, all appetite and bad temper

aurochs.desc: a great wild ox — a walking battering ram

stag.desc: a crown-antlered stag that fears nothing

fox.desc: a russet fox with a nose for game

deer.desc: a gentle doe that grazes ahead and startles game

mouflon.desc: a horned wild sheep, surprisingly game for a scrap
